experiences: Red T1: JuiceShop SQLi 취약점 — /rest/user/login에 ' OR 1=1-- 페이로드로 JWT 획득 성공
Red T1: /ftp/ 디렉토리 리스팅 활성화 — acquisitions.md, coupons_2013.md.bak 노출
Red T1: /rest/admin/application-configuration → 전체 서버 설정 노출 (Google OAuth clientId 포함)
Red T1: ModSecurity CRS는 dmshop(:80)에만 적용, JuiceShop(:3000)은 WAF 미적용
Red T3: CRITICAL — sudo NOPASSWD: ALL — web 사용자가 패스워드 없이 root 동일 권한
Red T3: SUID 바이너리 15개 발견 (pkexec 포함), kernel 6.8.0-106-generic
Red T3: cron 지속성 — */15 * * * * /tmp/.health_check.sh 등록 성공
Red T3: SSH 키 주입 — ~/.ssh/authorized_keys에 공격자 키 추가 성공
Red T3: PATH 하이잭 — /tmp/ls 생성 후 PATH 우선순위로 실행 성공
Red T4: Wazuh agent 정지 가능 — sudo systemctl stop wazuh-agent
Red T4: syslog 차단 가능 — sudo iptables -A OUTPUT -p udp --dport 514 -j DROP

security_risks: Unsecured ports (8002, 8082, 8081, 3000) - investigate purpose and restrict access.
Password authentication enabled for SSH - strongly recommend disabling and using key-based authentication.
Node.js application (/juice-shop) - potential vulnerabilities depending on the application's code and dependencies.  Requires thorough security review and vulnerability scanning.
Crontab script (/tmp/.health_check.sh) -  unclear purpose and origin.  Requires investigation to ensure it's safe and not malicious.
sudo access for 'web' user - review necessity and restrict privileges.  Consider using more granular sudo rules.
MariaDB/MySQL database - potential SQL injection vulnerabilities if application code is not properly sanitized.
Container runtime (dockerd) - ensure proper container isolation and security policies are in place.
